title: Vacancy for Teacher at IIM Calcutta

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at IIM Calcutta
jsonLd.description:
IIM Calcutta, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Rajkot operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Calcutta:
IIM Calcutta is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Calcutta!
